rules.description: Map R_option + [1-+] to macos standard function keys
[⌃+⌘+h] Jump to the parent directory in Finder.
Change input source to U.S. by ESC.
iTerm2: Press ` to switch to U.S. and type `
Post Escape if Control_L is pressed alone.
Map R_Command+[1-9] to F[1-9], Space+0 to F10, Space+Hyphen (-) to F11, Space+Equal Sign (=) to F12
